title: packera bolanderi var. harfordii
intro: Packera bolanderi var. harfordii, also known as Bolander's ragwort, is a plant species belonging to the sunflower family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, primarily as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic, to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Bolander's ragwort include its potential to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and sore throats, while its antiseptic properties may aid in wound healing and skin infections. Herbal preparations of Packera bolanderi var. harfordii can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures for oral consumption, and the leaves can be used as a topical application for skin irritations.
